name: Grok (SuperGrok) via x.com
known_issues: Navigating to x.com/grok loaded the Grok profile page rather than the Grok app interface — required an extra click on 'SuperGrok' in the sidebar to reach the actual chat
Processing time for image editing was notably long (~40 seconds of 'thinking')
The user had to manually browse folders in the file picker to find the image — no recent files shortcut was used
tips: Navigate directly to x.com/grok to access Grok, but note it may redirect to the profile page — use the SuperGrok link in the left sidebar instead
The paperclip icon for file attachment is located on the left side inside the text input box
The send button (arrow icon) is on the right side of the text input box
Image generation/editing can take 30-40+ seconds — be patient while Grok processes
Type your full text prompt before attaching the image so the context is ready
SuperGrok (paid tier) is required for image editing capabilities on Grok

Learned sequence: Opened Windows search and typed 'chrome' to find a → Clicked the Chrome URL bar and typed 'x.com/grok'  → Page loaded to the Grok profile page instead of th → Found 'SuperGrok' option on the left-hand sidebar  → In the SuperGrok interface, clicked the 'Ask anyth → Typed the prompt: 'edit this image and create an a → Clicked the paperclip/attachment button on the lef → File browser dialog opened; navigated folders to l
